counts.actual_jsonl_notes: Only 3 JSONL files exist in the worktree (agent-b-results.jsonl, dogfood-results-agent-a.jsonl, logs/telemetry-minimax-m27.jsonl). These are test outputs, not Claude Code session transcripts. The original session JSONL files live outside this worktree in ~/.claude/projects/ and were chunked into narrative/data/chunks/ during data preparation.

discrepancy_explanation: The 71 vs 58 discrepancy is caused by 13 sessions that appear in BOTH era4-quality.json and era5-conversational.json chunks. These are sessions from the boundary date 2026-03-22, which falls in the overlap of era4 (Mar 21-22) and era5 (Mar 22-23). The telemetry-sessions.json correctly notes this in its _meta.methodology but uses 71 as total_sessions anyway. The actual unique session count is 58. The 1148 message count has three compounding errors: (1) the 13 overlapping sessions are double-counted in the era-level sums (+189 messages), (2) the era6/era7 human_messages_total values appear to be SWAPPED in the telemetry file (era6 shows 148 but chunks sum to 41; era7 shows 41 but chunks sum to 148), and (3) era4 and era5 telemetry values (297, 348) are each slightly inflated (+20, +19) versus the actual chunk entry sums (277, 329). The 39-message gap between the chunk overlap sum (1109) and the telemetry claim (1148) equals 20+19 from the era4/era5 inflation. The verified unique message count is 920.

overlap_details.explanation: Sessions timestamped on 2026-03-22 were assigned to both era4 and era5 chunks because that date falls in the declared range of both eras

session_count.error: Sum of per-era session_counts without deduplication. 13 sessions counted twice.

errors: 13 overlapping sessions double-counted in era4+era5 sums (+189 messages)
era6/era7 human_messages_total values swapped: telemetry says era6=148 era7=41, actual is era6=41 era7=148

recommended_label: unique Claude Code sessions with human messages
recommended_message_label: total human messages across all sessions (verified by summing human_message_count fields in human-messages.json)

per_era_verified.note: Era4 and era5 share 13 sessions from 2026-03-22. Sessions-per-era counts include overlaps (9+27+21+2+5+4+3=71). Unique sessions = 58. Message sums include overlaps too. Unique messages = 920.
